creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #2)

It builds for me, doing poudriere testport on 13.0-RELEASE-p7:

> Message from php80-pdo-8.0.16:
> 
> --
> This file has been added to automatically load the installed extension:
> /usr/local/etc/php/ext-20-pdo.ini
> ===>   php80-phalcon-5.0.0.b3 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20200930/pdo.so - found
> ===>   Returning to build of php80-phalcon-5.0.0.b3

I rebased my ports tree to 70c9959b17e23dd8cd6bfcb1667e8809fcc5e82a before testing to make sure there weren't any recent changes causing problems I hadn't detected before submitting the patch.

Please note the lack of the "-debug" postfix in my output. Might there be a non-standard setting causing issues with your test build?
